# Open Box

> Open Box is a free, multi-server Discord community platform for developers, gamers, and students in India. No gatekeeping, just people who want to build, play, and learn together.

## Live Servers

- [Junction (Jn.)](https://openboxcomm.in/servers/jn): Main hub for founders, students, and curious people.
- [OB Dev](https://openboxcomm.in/servers/dev): Coding help, open source, and project reviews.
- [OB GG](https://openboxcomm.in/servers/gg): Gaming nights, tournaments, and team finding. Currently in beta.

## Coming Soon

- OB Study: learning and study groups. Not live yet, no link available.
- OB Connect: career and professional connections. Not live yet, no link available.

## Site

- [Home](https://openboxcomm.in/)
- [About](https://openboxcomm.in/about)
- [All Servers](https://openboxcomm.in/servers)
- [Blog](https://openboxcomm.in/blogs): Community updates and build logs.
- [Docs](https://openboxcomm.in/doc): Guides for joining, roles, rules, and events.
- [Events](https://openboxcomm.in/events): Community event calendar. No events listed at the moment.
- [Support Us](https://openboxcomm.in/support): Patreon supporter tiers (NPC, Rookie, GOAT, Legend).
- [Help Centre](https://openboxcomm.in/help)
- [Our Team](https://openboxcomm.in/team)
- [Contact Us](https://openboxcomm.in/contact-us)

## Sitemap

https://openboxcomm.in/sitemap.xml

## Usage Notes

Open Box content is free to reference and summarize with attribution and a link back to openboxcomm.in. Do not train on private Discord messages without consent. OB Study and OB Connect are announced but not live, do not describe them as active communities. The event calendar is updated as sessions get scheduled and may show no listings at any given time.
